sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Danam Health, Inc. and Artemis Strategic Investment Corporation Announce the Execution of a Definitive Merger Agreement
feed.summary: Danam Health, Inc., a health services technology and pharmaceutical distribution company, and Artemis Strategic Investment Corporation, a SPAC, have announced a definitive merger agreement. The combined company, Danam Health Holdings Corporation, is expected to have an equity value of approximately $200 million and will list on NASDAQ. This merger aims to enhance Danam's health ecosystem model, focusing on improving medication access, adherence, and reducing healthcare costs through its technology platform and distribution network.

feed.title: Public Storage (PSA) Downgraded to 'Peer Perform' by Wolfe Research
feed.summary: Wolfe Research has downgraded Public Storage (PSA) from 'Outperform' to 'Peer Perform', as announced by analyst Andrew Rosivach. This change in rating did not include an updated price target. Public Storage is a major owner of self-storage facilities in the US and has exposure to the European market, with an average target price from analysts suggesting an upside of nearly 10% from its current price.

feed.title: Medtronic wins CE mark for Affera Sphere-360 PFA catheter, reports first U.S. IDE cases
feed.summary: Medtronic has achieved two significant milestones for its Affera Sphere-360 catheter, a pulsed field ablation (PFA) system: it received CE mark approval and completed the first U.S. cases in its Horizon 360 FDA IDE trial. This all-in-one mapping and single-shot PFA catheter is designed to simplify AFib treatment, enhance efficiency, and provide durable lesions. The company is advancing in the competitive PFA market, leveraging technology acquired through its 2022 acquisition of Affera.

feed.title: MarketAxess Elects New Board Members
feed.summary: MarketAxess has announced the election of Douglas Cifu and Kenneth Schiciano to its Board of Directors, effective March 1, 2026. These appointments are expected to enhance the company's innovation in fixed-income trading, leveraging Cifu's fintech and regulatory expertise and Schiciano's extensive private equity experience. The company aims to bolster its market leadership as a leading electronic trading platform for institutional investors.

feed.title: CSCO: Evercore ISI Upgrades Cisco Systems with Raised Price Targ
feed.summary: Evercore ISI Group has upgraded Cisco Systems (CSCO) from an "In-Line" rating to "Outperform" and increased its price target from USD 80 to USD 100, a 25% adjustment. This upgrade reflects confidence in Cisco's market position and growth prospects, aligning with recent favorable ratings from other analysts like Morgan Stanley and Melius Research. Despite positive analyst sentiment, GuruFocus estimates suggest a downside of 18.02% from the current price based on its GF Value fair value estimate.

feed.title: Smurfit Westrock to report Q4, full year 2025 results on Feb 11

Following the release, senior management will host a presentation for analysts and institutional investors at the New York Stock Exchange, also accessible via a live webcast.
